Simple tool for tracking and analyzing job applications, including
status summaries, offer comparisons, and response timing.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`application_summary()`](https://adc-405-s26.github.io/jobtrackeR/reference/application_summary.md)
  : Summarize job application statuses
- [`compare_offers()`](https://adc-405-s26.github.io/jobtrackeR/reference/compare_offers.md)
  : Compare job offers adjusted for cost of living
- [`days_since_applied()`](https://adc-405-s26.github.io/jobtrackeR/reference/days_since_applied.md)
  : Calculate days since each application was submitted
- [`jobs`](https://adc-405-s26.github.io/jobtrackeR/reference/jobs.md) :
  Job Application Tracking Dataset
- [`pipeline_stage()`](https://adc-405-s26.github.io/jobtrackeR/reference/pipeline_stage.md)
  : Visualize the job application pipeline

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Introduction to
  jobtrackr](https://adc-405-s26.github.io/jobtrackeR/articles/introduction-to-jobtrackr.md):
